system.description:
The psyker creates a form-fitting field of telekinetic energy for self-defence. Grants 1 AP per Psy Rating, stacking with worn armour on all locations. Lasts one Round unless sustained. Not opaque — does not block line of sight. Also works against attacks with the Warp Weapon quality.

Focus Power Test: Willpower

Prerequisites: Telekinetic Crush

XP Cost: 200
